title: xylopia oxyantha
intro: Xylopia oxyantha, also known as the West African pepper, is a plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xylopia oxyantha include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable treatment for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
